text:
If you are a crypto trader, it’s gonna get better for us, because I’m about to partner with a crypto prop firm to bring sweet deals to my followers !!!

No more over risking your hard earned capital.

most traders think passing a prop firm evaluation is the hard part

i’d argue that’s the easy part

keeping the account is where the real test begins
($10,000 alpha below) 👇

————<>————

during an evaluation, you’re patient

you wait for your setup, you respect risk

you don’t revenge trade because you know one mistake can end everything

then you pass…

and suddenly your focus changes

you’re thinking about payouts, about scaling, about making the most of the opportunity

without realizing it, you stop trading your plan and start trading the outcome

that’s where most traders lose the account

the market didn’t change, your strategy probably didn’t either, but your mindset did

that’s why i like seeing firms give traders more choice instead of forcing everyone into the same markets

that’s why i actually like what @CFTradercom just did

they’ve added Gold (XAUUSD) to their evaluations

it sounds like a small update, but i don’t think it is

every trader has a market that fits them best

some read btc better than anything else, some live on indices, and plenty of traders understand gold far better than either

having that choice means you can lean into your edge instead of forcing trades in markets you don’t really understand

they’re also celebrating the launch with 10 Golden Tickets, each worth a $10,000 evaluation account ($100,000 total)

plus 15% off all 1-step & 2-step evaluations with the code XAU if you were already planning to take one

but the giveaway isn’t the part i’d focus on

the real takeaway is this

whether you’re trading gold, crypto or forex…

consistency doesn’t come from finding more trades

it comes from repeating the same good decisions in the markets where you already have an edge

$APT Crashed 97%... But The Next Bull Run Could Start From Here

#APT Has Corrected More Than 97% From Its ATH And Is Now Trading Inside A Long-Term Weekly Demand Zone. While The HTF Trend Remains Bearish, Risk-Reward Is Becoming Increasingly Attractive For Long-Term Investors.

Technical Structure
✅ Two Major Distribution Legs (-74% → -84%) Confirm Macro Downtrend
✅ Weekly Break Of Structure Below $3.80 Confirmed Bearish Continuation
✅ Lower High Rejections At $3.50 → $1.60 → $0.80
✅ Selling Pressure Is Gradually Weakening Near Weekly Demand
✅ High-Risk Accumulation Zone: $0.60-$0.40
✅ First Bullish Confirmation Above $0.80
✅ HTF Trend Reversal Only Above $1.24
✅ Invalidation: Weekly Close Below $0.39

➡️ Current Phase: Post-Capitulation → Early Accumulation
➡️ October 2026: Major Unlock Pressure Expected To Reduce Significantly

Scenario 1 → Bullish Reclaim:
A Weekly Close Above $0.80 Would Signal The First Higher High. Reclaiming $1.24 Would Confirm A Higher-Timeframe Trend Shift.

Targets: $1.24 → $2 → $3.50 → $7 → $21 (ATH)

Fundamental Outlook:
✅ Proposal 183 Introduces Stronger Tokenomics Through Lower Emissions, Gas Fee Burn & Supply Cap
✅ Institutional RWA Adoption Continues To Expand On Aptos
✅ Strong Layer-1 Infrastructure With Move VM & Parallel Execution

$APT Is Entering A High-Asymmetry Zone Where Downside Risk Is Reduced, But The Bull Market Is Not Confirmed Until Price Reclaims Key Resistance Levels.

TA & Fundamental Analysis Only. Not Financial Advice. ALWAYS DYOR.

Trading is hard, and not enough people talk about it.

I discovered trading in late 2019 and started in 2020 with no mentor. I had no idea about the reality of this business. I didn't know that you could do everything right and still lose.

In 2022, I worked for two months straight, got paid, and deposited everything into trading because I believed in what I had learned. Within a week, it was all gone. That's when reality started to hit.

In 2023, I started buying prop firm accounts and breached them within days. My journey has been full of pain, mistakes, setbacks, and lessons.

Most people around me told me to forget trading and focus on a "real" career. The only person who consistently believed in me was my mum.

Because I had no guidance early on, I developed bad habits, overtrading, over-risking, and revenge trading. Those mistakes cost me time, money, and confidence.

But if there's one thing I've learned about myself, it's that I'm resilient.

I'm still here. Still learning. Still improving. Still believing in this dream.

And I won't stop until I succeed and give my family the life I've promised them.

Every serious prop trader should have an active X account.

Have at least 300-500 followers and ideally some engagement...

Why?

If there are any issues, you have the power to use your voice and have a higher chance of resolving any problems.

Don't abuse it though as you will end up like most of the prop firm pages, irrelevant no matter the size of following.
Structure traders: isn't this a break of Structure? Why did it fail? https://t.co/oQVjqC8e4M

Bitcoin has now reclaimed $65,000 after briefly breaking below it during yesterday's sell-off.

While that's a good initial response from buyers, the real test is just starting.

$65,700 is the main level buyers MUST reclaim to flip short-term momentum back to the bulls.

If buyers fail to get back above $65,700, $63,000 is the next stop.

A lot of traders are panicking that yesterday’s breakdown was the start of a major rollover.

I’m not convinced the data supports that conclusion yet.

Spot Bitcoin ETFs continue to show steady institutional demand, funding rates remain balanced, and we haven't seen any real panic or leverage wipeout.

Yesterday’s move fits the exact pattern of a classic liquidity sweep to flush out late longs before revealing the true direction.

Watch the next 4 to 12 hours closely.

A reclaim of $65,700 confirms a bear trap. A rejection sends us straight down to test $63,000.
